name: accounting firms using QuickBooks processing 10-20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms using QuickBooks processing 10-20 invoices/month, manual extraction of tax data causes delays in compliance reporting. We automate data extraction instead of manual data entry from QuickBooks to tax filing software.
target_audience: accounting firms using QuickBooks processing 10-20 invoices/month
problem_solved: manual extraction of tax data leads to delays in compliance reporting

locked_fields.primary_user: accounting firms using QuickBooks processing 10-20 invoices/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: manual extraction of tax data leads to delays in compliance reporting
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For accounting firms using QuickBooks processing 10-20 invoices/month, manual extraction of tax data causes delays in compliance reporting. We automate data extraction instead of manual data entry from QuickBooks to tax filing software.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual data entry from QuickBooks to tax filing software

one_liner: For accounting firms using QuickBooks processing 10-20 invoices/month, manual extraction of tax data causes delays in compliance reporting. We automate data extraction instead of manual data entry from QuickBooks to tax filing software.
